title: Revenge
overview: He spent his life working for a black company, only to learn that his beloved daughter was born from the man his wife spent years cheating on him with - his own boss. Yearning for revenge on his death bed, he's reincarnated in a space fantasy as the Evil Lord Liam.

title: Rebirth
overview: At the ripe age of 5, Liam is gifted a custom-order AI robot by his parents, and then granted full control of their fiefdom, the stellar system of Alcaeus, so they can abandon him for the capital and leave him shouldered with the family's debts.

title: Way of the Flash
overview: Liam retains a martial arts instructor of questionable character.

title: First Battle
overview: Nias customizes the Avid. Liam masters Flash, then defends his mine from pirates.

title: Honey Trap
overview: Liam uses his loot from the pirates to replace his fleet and Nias tries to seduce him into buying her ships.

title: Treasure Island
overview: Logs on the pirate ships reveals their home base and Liam argues with the warp gate so he can go raid them.

title: Princess Knight
overview: Goaz tortures Christiania and her soldiers, grotesquely modifying their bodies. Liam rescues them.

title: Harem Project
overview: Liam tries to build an NTR harem, but struggles because over 10,000 women are ready to eagerly consent to it.

title: Mass-Produced Maids
overview: Liam laments not being more of an evil lord but his people & robots love him. The Guide leads pirates to him.

title: Decisive Battle
overview: The Goaz pirates declare war on the Banfield domain, and Liam faces them in battle.

title: Evil Lord
overview: Liam routs the pirates and faces Goaz in a final showdown.

title: Family
overview: After hearing about Liam's success, his good-for-nothing family comes begging for more money.
